enonce.texte:
Look at the pictures and write the name of each season.

Seasons: spring, summer, autumn/fall, winter
images: Picture 1: Trees with green leaves and flowers blooming. Spring season.
Picture 2: Sun shining brightly, children swimming in a pool. Summer season.
Picture 3: Trees with orange and yellow leaves falling. Autumn or fall season.
Picture 4: Snow covering the ground, children building a snowman. Winter season.

questions.texte: Identify each season from the pictures.

enonce.texte:
Match the activities with the correct season. Write the letter of the season next to each activity.

  • A. Spring
  • B. Summer
  • C. Autumn (Fall)
  • D. Winter

Activities:

  1. Swimming in the river
  2. Planting crops in the field
  3. Collecting fallen leaves
  4. Building a snowman
  5. Harvesting fruits
  6. Playing in the snow
  7. Watching flowers bloom
  8. Going to the beach

questions.texte: Match each activity with its correct season.
questions.reponse:
1. B (Summer)
2. A (Spring)
3. C (Autumn/Fall)
4. D (Winter)
5. C (Autumn/Fall)
6. D (Winter)
7. A (Spring)
8. B (Summer)

sousQuestions.texte: What activities do you like to do in summer? Write two sentences.
sousQuestions.reponse: Example: In summer, I like to go swimming. I also like to eat ice cream and play with my friends.

sousQuestions.texte: What do farmers do in autumn?
sousQuestions.reponse: Farmers harvest fruits and crops in autumn.

enonce.texte:
Complete the sentences with the correct weather word from the box.

Word Box: sunny, rainy, windy, cloudy, foggy, snowy

  1. In summer, the weather is often ________. The sun shines brightly.
  2. In winter, it is ________ and the ground is white.
  3. When it is ________, you can see many clouds in the sky.
  4. In spring, it can be ________. Flowers need water to grow.
  5. On a ________ day, the trees move and leaves fly in the air.
  6. In the morning, it can be ________. You cannot see far away.

questions.texte: Complete the sentences with the correct weather words.
questions.reponse:
1. sunny
2. snowy
3. cloudy
4. rainy
5. windy
6. foggy

sousQuestions.texte: What is your favourite season? Why? Write one sentence.
sousQuestions.reponse: Example: My favourite season is spring because the weather is warm and flowers bloom.

enonce.texte:
Write 4 to 5 sentences about your favourite season. Use the questions below to help you.

  • What is the name of the season?
  • What is the weather like?
  • What activities do you do?
  • What do you like about this season?
  • What do you wear during this season?

questions.texte: Write a short paragraph describing your favourite season.
questions.reponse: Example answer: My favourite season is summer. The weather is sunny and hot. I like to go swimming in the river. I also eat ice cream and play football with my friends. I wear shorts and T-shirts during summer. Summer is a very fun season.

enonce.texte:
In Cameroon, we have two main seasons: the rainy season and the dry season. Read the information below and answer the questions.

The Rainy Season: It rains a lot. The weather is wet and cool. Farmers plant crops. Rivers and lakes are full of water. People wear raincoats and use umbrellas.

The Dry Season: It does not rain. The weather is hot and sunny. Farmers harvest crops. Rivers and lakes are low. People wear light clothes and drink a lot of water.

questions.texte: Compare the rainy season and the dry season in Cameroon. Write three differences.
questions.reponse:
1. The rainy season is wet and cool, while the dry season is hot and sunny.
2. Farmers plant crops in the rainy season, but they harvest crops in the dry season.
3. Rivers and lakes are full in the rainy season, but they are low in the dry season.

sousQuestions.texte: What do people wear during the rainy season? What do they wear during the dry season?
sousQuestions.reponse: During the rainy season, people wear raincoats and use umbrellas. During the dry season, people wear light clothes.

sousQuestions.texte: Write a short paragraph (3-4 sentences) describing your favourite season in Cameroon and why you like it.
sousQuestions.reponse: Example: My favourite season in Cameroon is the dry season. The weather is sunny and warm. I like to play football with my friends. I also like to eat mangoes because they are sweet. The dry season is a happy time for me.

enonce.texte:
Complete the dialogue with the correct words from the box.

Word Box: spring, summer, autumn, winter, sunny, rainy, cold, hot

Mary: Hello John! What is your favourite season?

John: My favourite season is (1) _______. I like it because the weather is (2) _______ and flowers bloom.

Mary: Do you like (3) _______?

John: No, I don't like winter. It is very (4) _______.

Mary: What do you do in summer?

John: In summer, I like to go swimming. The weather is (5) _______ and sunny.

Mary: I like (6) _______. I like to see the leaves fall.

questions.texte: Complete the dialogue with the correct words.
questions.reponse:
1. spring
2. warm
3. winter
4. cold
5. hot
6. autumn

sousQuestions.texte: What season does Mary like? What does she like to do?
sousQuestions.reponse: Mary likes autumn. She likes to see the leaves fall.

sousQuestions.texte: What activities do you like to do in summer? Write two sentences.
sousQuestions.reponse: Example: In summer, I like to go swimming. I also like to eat ice cream and play with my friends.

enonce.texte:
Read the text carefully and answer the questions.

My Favourite Season

My name is Amina. I live in Douala, Cameroon. My favourite season is the rainy season. The weather is cool and fresh. It rains almost every day. During the rainy season, I like to stay at home and read books. I also like to eat hot food. My mother cooks delicious soup. The roads are wet and muddy. Sometimes, it is difficult to go to school. But I love the rainy season because the weather is not too hot. I can sleep well at night.

questions.texte: Answer the following questions in complete sentences.

sousQuestions.reponse: Amina's favourite season is the rainy season.

sousQuestions.texte: What is the weather like during the rainy season?
sousQuestions.reponse: The weather is cool and fresh. It rains almost every day.

sousQuestions.texte: What does Amina like to do during the rainy season?
sousQuestions.reponse: Amina likes to stay at home and read books. She also likes to eat hot food.

sousQuestions.texte: Why does Amina love the rainy season?
sousQuestions.reponse: Amina loves the rainy season because the weather is not too hot and she can sleep well at night.

sousQuestions.texte: What is your favourite season? Explain why.
sousQuestions.reponse: Example: My favourite season is summer because the weather is sunny and I can play outside with my friends.

enonce.texte:
Write the correct season for each type of clothing.

Clothes: coat, raincoat, T-shirt, shorts, sweater, umbrella

Seasons: spring, summer, autumn, winter

questions.texte: Match each clothing item with the season you wear it most.
questions.reponse:
Coat - Winter
Raincoat - Spring/Rainy season
T-shirt - Summer
Shorts - Summer
Sweater - Autumn/Winter
Umbrella - Spring/Rainy season

sousQuestions.texte: What do you wear in summer? Write two sentences.
sousQuestions.reponse: In summer, I wear T-shirts and shorts. I also wear sandals because it is hot.

enonce.texte:
Create a poster about one season. Your poster should include:

  • The name of the season
  • A drawing or description of the weather
  • Two activities people do in this season
  • One type of clothing people wear
  • One sentence explaining why you like this season

Write your poster text below.

questions.texte: Write the text for your poster about your favourite season.
questions.reponse:
Example: My Favourite Season: Summer
The weather is sunny and hot. In summer, people go to the beach and swim. They also eat ice cream. People wear T-shirts and shorts. I like summer because I can play with my friends outside.
